name: Apex Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Experience premium sound with these over-ear wireless Bluetooth headphones. Features active noise cancellation (ANC), 40-hour battery life, built-in microphone for clear calls, and deep bass. Ideal for travel, office, or study.

name: Chronos Smartwatch & Fitness Tracker
description: Stay connected and track your health with this sleek smartwatch. Monitor heart rate, sleep quality, steps, and calories. Features a waterproof touch display, GPS tracking, and notifications for calls and messages.

name: Aura SoundBar Pro
description: Upgrade your home theater setup with this 2.1 channel wireless Bluetooth soundbar. Comes with a wireless subwoofer, Dolby Audio support, and optical/auxiliary inputs for immersive room-filling cinematic sound.

name: Vivid 4K Ultra HD Projector
description: Bring the movie theater experience home. This portable smart projector supports 4K resolution, dual-band Wi-Fi, wireless screen mirroring, and built-in stereo speakers. Perfect for outdoor movie nights and gaming.

name: Zenith Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
description: Work in comfort with this ergonomic wireless optical mouse. Precision tracking, adjustable DPI, silent clicks, and rechargeable battery. Reduces wrist strain during long hours of computer or laptop use.

name: Nova Dual-Port USB-C Fast Charger
description: Compact fast-charging wall adapter with dual USB-C ports. Powered by GaN technology for cooler, safer, and faster charging of laptops, smartphones, tablets, and wireless headphones.

name: Eclipse Bluetooth Pocket Speaker
description: Compact and portable wireless Bluetooth speaker with crystal clear sound and rich bass. Waterproof IPX7 design makes it perfect for travel, outdoor camping, beach parties, and shower use.

name: FlexiCore Non-Slip Yoga Mat
description: Eco-friendly, extra thick non-slip yoga mat made from natural rubber. Offers excellent cushioning, durability, and grip for yoga, pilates, stretching, and home floor workouts. Includes a carrying strap.

name: HydroFlow Insulated Water Bottle
description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps drinks ice cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof lid with straw, BPA-free, ideal for gym, hiking, sports, and daily hydration.

name: Titan Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells for home strength training. Quickly adjust weight plates from 5 to 52.5 lbs with a simple turn of a dial. Durable mold plates ensure quiet and smooth workouts.

name: Trailblazer Waterproof Backpack
description: Lightweight, waterproof hiking backpack with 40L capacity. Features multiple compartments, breathable mesh shoulder straps, hydration sleeve, and rain cover. Perfect for outdoor camping, travel, and trekking.

name: AeroStep Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of 5 stackable latex resistance workout bands with handles, ankle straps, and door anchor. Ideal for physical therapy, strength training, muscle building, and home fitness routines.

name: PulseRun Folding Treadmill
description: Foldable electric treadmill for home cardio training. Features LCD display, built-in workout programs, heart rate sensors, and shock-absorbing running deck. Easily folds for compact under-bed storage.

name: CrispAir Digital Air Fryer
description: Cook healthier meals with 85% less oil. This 5.8-quart digital air fryer features 10 one-touch cooking presets, rapid air circulation, nonstick dishwasher-safe basket, and a recipe cookbook included.

name: Barista Touch Espresso Machine
description: Premium stainless steel espresso machine with integrated conical burr grinder. Features PID temperature control, steam wand for milk texturing, and touch screen interface. Brew barista-quality espresso, latte, and cappuccino at home.

name: SmartGlow LED Smart Light Bulbs
description: Energy-efficient Wi-Fi enabled RGB color-changing smart LED light bulbs. Dimmable, compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant for voice control. Schedule lighting via mobile app without a hub.

name: Thermoshield Precision Sous Vide Cooker
description: Achieve restaurant-quality results at home with this precision immersion circulator. Features Wi-Fi connectivity, app control, accurate temperature adjustment, and quiet operation for cooking steak, fish, and vegetables.

name: EverClean Robotic Vacuum Cleaner
description: Smart robotic vacuum cleaner with powerful suction, self-charging dock, and anti-drop sensors. Cleans pet hair, carpets, and hard floors automatically. Control via remote or smart home voice assistant.

name: ChefCut Professional Knife Block Set
description: 15-piece kitchen knife set made from high-carbon German stainless steel. Includes chef's knife, utility knife, bread knife, steak knives, kitchen shears, and built-in sharpener in the wooden block.

name: PureBrew Pour-Over Coffee Maker
description: Elegant glass pour-over coffee maker with permanent stainless steel mesh filter. Extracts rich flavor and aromatic oils from coffee grounds. High-quality borosilicate glass design.

name: Echoes of the Cosmos (Sci-Fi Novel)
description: An epic sci-fi space opera novel exploring deep space exploration, AI consciousness, and alien contact. A thrilling, thought-provoking read that delves into the future of humanity among the stars.

name: Monarch Classic Fountain Pen
description: Elegant fine-nib fountain pen crafted for writers and executives. Features a polished metal body, smooth ink flow, and refillable converter. Delivered in a luxury gift box with premium black ink cartridge.

name: Heritage Leather Bound Journal
description: Handcrafted genuine leather journal with unlined refillable cream-colored pages. Perfect as a travel diary, sketchbook, or daily planner. Sturdy binding and classic wrap-around leather strap.

name: Mindfulness & Zen Coloring Book
description: Relax and unwind with this beautiful coloring book designed for adults. Features 50 intricate mandalas, botanical illustrations, and patterns to promote mindfulness, stress relief, and artistic expression.

name: The Art of Machine Learning (Textbook)
description: Comprehensive textbook covering machine learning fundamentals, deep neural networks, natural language processing (NLP), and AI recommendation systems. Includes practical Python code examples and exercises.

name: ProSketch Architectural Drawing Pens
description: Set of 8 waterproof archival black ink micro-line pens for drawing, sketching, drafting, and technical illustration. Varied tip sizes from 0.05mm to brush tip. Non-toxic and bleed-free.

name: Stratus Lightweight Running Shoes
description: Breathable mesh running sneakers for men and women. Engineered with shock-absorbing memory foam insoles, lightweight flexible outsoles, and snug fit to support high-performance workouts, jogging, and walking.

name: Navigator Polarized Sports Sunglasses
description: Durable polarized sunglasses providing 100% UV protection. Ergonomic lightweight frame designed for running, cycling, fishing, and outdoor sports. Reduces glare from water, snow, and asphalt.

name: Urbanite Waterproof Commuter Backpack
description: Sleek and secure laptop backpack for daily commute and business travel. Features waterproof exterior, padded compartment for 15.6-inch laptop, USB charging port, and anti-theft hidden pockets.

name: ThermaFit Merino Wool Hiking Socks
description: Pack of 3 pairs of merino wool hiking socks. Moisture-wicking, odor-resistant, and heavily cushioned to prevent blisters during outdoor trekking, running, and cold weather camping trips.

name: Ventus Packable Windbreaker Jacket
description: Ultra-lightweight, water-resistant windbreaker jacket. Easily packs into its own pocket. Features adjustable hood, zippered pockets, and elastic cuffs. Ideal protection for running, hiking, and travel.

name: Chronograph Classic Leather Watch
description: Timeless men's wrist watch featuring a genuine brown leather strap, stainless steel case, blue dial with calendar date, and quartz chronograph movement. Water resistant up to 30 meters.
